files.reason: Wait for live commit parity after Railway upload, then run the full ship check automatically.
files.excerpt:
diff --git a/deploy.sh b/deploy.sh
index 47f379b..8525d4b 100755
--- a/deploy.sh
+++ b/deploy.sh
@@ -6,2 +6,4 @@ set -e
 MSG="${1:-deploy: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')}"
+TARGET_BRANCH="$(git branch --show-current)"
+TARGET_COMMIT="$(git rev-parse HEAD)"
 
@@ -17,2 +19,12 @@ fi
 
+echo "=== Deploy target ==="
+echo "Branch: $TARGET_BRANCH"
+echo "Commit: $TARGET_COMMIT"
+
+echo "=== Verifying deploy preflight ==="
+npm run check:deploy-post-call-fix-ready
+
+echo "=== Refreshing deploy approval artifacts ==="
+npm run write:deploy-approval-bundle
+
 echo "=== Verifying Railway access ==="
@@ -57,4 +69,13 @@ echo "https://railway.com/project/90599f03-6d6f-4044-8933-e0301be67a82/service/9
 echo ""
-echo "Post-deploy verification (run after ~2 min):"
-echo "npm run check:post-deploy-live"
+echo "=== Waiting for live app to match local HEAD ==="
+if npm run wait:live-is-current; then
+  echo "=== Live app now matches local HEAD ==="
+else
+  echo "WARN live app did not reach local HEAD before timeout; production is still stale."
+  exit 1
+fi
+
+echo "=== Running full post-deploy ship check ==="
+npm run check:ship-live
+
 echo ""

files.reason: Adds the live verification, deploy handoff, and real proof-call scripts used to prove the shipped path.
files.excerpt:
diff --git a/package.json b/package.json
index 1efd8df..f0df272 100644
--- a/package.json
+++ b/package.json
@@ -25,4 +25,8 @@
     "smoke:buyer-auth": "bash scripts/buyer-funnel-auth-smoke.sh",
+    "check:deploy": "npm run check:live-deploy-readiness",
+    "check:live:health": "npm run check:live-app-critical-health",
     "check:deploy-fingerprint": "node scripts/check-deploy-fingerprint.mjs",
     "check:deploy-fingerprint:current": "SMIRK_EXPECT_BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current) SMIRK_EXPECT_VERSION=$(git rev-parse HEAD) node scripts/check-deploy-fingerprint.mjs",
+    "check:live-is-current": "node scripts/check-live-is-current.mjs",
+    "wait:live-is-current": "node scripts/wait-for-live-current.mjs",
     "check:live-db-health": "node scripts/check-live-db-health.mjs",
@@ -31,2 +35,21 @@
     "check:operator-session-live": "node scripts/check-operator-session-live.mjs",
+    "check:proof-loop-live": "node scripts/check-proof-loop-live.mjs",
+    "check:proof-artifacts-live": "node scripts/check-proof-artifacts-live.mjs",
+    "check:post-call-intelligence-live": "node scripts/check-post-call-intelligence-live.mjs",
+    "reprocess:latest-call-live": "node scripts/reprocess-latest-call-live.mjs",
+    "check:twilio-test-webhook-live": "node scripts/check-twilio-test-webhook-live.mjs",
+    "check:real-call-readiness": "node scripts/check-real-call-readiness.mjs",
+    "check:railway:test-call-allowlist": "node scripts/check-railway-test-call-allowlist.mjs",
+    "set:test-call-allowlist": "bash scripts/set-test-call-allowlist.sh",
+    "print:real-call-setup": "node scripts/print-real-call-setup.mjs",
+    "print:deploy-blocker": "node scripts/print-deploy-blocker.mjs",
+    "print:deploy-approval-request": "node scripts/print-deploy-approval-request.mjs",
+    "print:post-call-fix-handoff": "node scripts/print-post-call-fix-handoff.mjs",
+    "print:high-risk-deploy-review": "node scripts/print-high-risk-deploy-review.mjs",
+    "write:post-call-fix-handoff": "node scripts/write-post-call-fix-handoff.mjs",
+    "write:deploy-approval-note": "node scripts/write-deploy-approval-note.mjs",
+    "write:deploy-approval-bundle": "node scripts/write-deploy-approval-bundle.mjs",
+    "check:deploy-post-call-fix-ready": "node scripts/check-deploy-post-call-fix-ready.mjs",
+    "deploy:post-call-fix": "npm run check:deploy-post-call-fix-ready && ./deploy.sh 'deploy: ship post-call intelligence fix'",
+    "call:real-test": "node scripts/place-real-test-call.mjs",
     "check:buyer-routes-live": "node scripts/check-live-buyer-routes.mjs",
@@ -38,2 +61,3 @@
     "check:post-deploy-live": "npm run check:deploy-fingerprint && npm run check:google-auth-live && npm run check:buyer-routes-live && npm run check:live-db-health && npm run smoke:buyer-auth && npm run check:operator-session-live",
+    "check:ship-live": "npm run check:live-is-current && npm run check:live-deploy-readiness && npm run check:post-deploy-live",
     "watchdog:health": "curl -sf ${APP_URL:-http://localhost:3000}/health | node -e \"const d=require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8');const j=JSON.parse(d);console.log('Health:',j.status,'| uptime:',j.uptime,'| db:',j.db);process.exit(j.status==='ok'?0:1)\"",
@@ -49,5 +73,11 @@
     "load:railway-auth": "bash scripts/load-railway-auth.sh",
+    "save:railway-auth": "bash scripts/save-railway-auth.sh",
     "bootstrap:railway-auth": "bash scripts/bootstrap-railway-auth.sh",
+    "print:railway-auth-setup": "node scripts/print-railway-auth-setup.mjs",
     "set:operator-secret": "bash scripts/set-operator-secret.sh",
     "set:google-auth-env": "bash scripts/set-google-auth-env.sh",
+    "fix:google-auth-live": "bash scripts/set-google-auth-env.sh",
+    "fix:google-auth-live:dry": "bash scripts/set-google-auth-env.sh --dry-run",
+    "fix:google-auth-live:from-scan": "node scripts/fix-google-auth-live-from-scan.mjs",
+    "find:google-auth-client-id": "node scripts/find-google-auth-client-id.mjs",
     "print:google-auth-setup": "node scripts/print-google-auth-setup.mjs"

files.reason: Always trigger post-call intelligence after call end so summaries are attempted on production calls.
Tightens buyer activation/login flow so payment follows activation request and invite-based access is clearer.
